description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a metallic silver slide and a dark, textured grip. The frame and slide are constructed from metal, likely steel, with a matte finish, while the grip panels appear to be made of a dark polymer or wood with visible checkering for enhanced hold. The handgun features a prominent trigger guard, a hammer at the rear, and a visible muzzle flash indicating it is being fired. The slide has minimal visible markings, and the magazine base is flat and flush with the grip. The overall design is reminiscent of classic 1911-style pistols, with ergonomic contours and functional controls.
description: A metallic semi-automatic handgun with a dark, textured grip and a visible muzzle flash, featuring a classic, ergonomic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the metallic slide, dark checkered grip, trigger, hammer, and a bright muzzle flash at the barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the muzzle flash and the width of the slide and barrel, with minimal detail on the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the slide, grip, trigger, and hammer, with the muzzle flash extending from the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip, hammer, and the slide, with the muzzle flash visible at the far end.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is dark in color, likely black or brown, with a checkered texture for improved traction. It has a rectangular profile with slight ergonomic contouring to fit the hand comfortably. The surface appears to be made of polymer or wood, and there are visible screws securing the grip panels. No visible logos or finger grooves are present, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded with a moderate thickness, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and the curvature is traditional, lacking any squared-off edges or undercuts. The design is simple and functional, without integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, extending slightly beyond the slide, with a smooth, unthreaded profile. There are no visible compensators, ports, or suppressor threads. The exterior finish matches the slide, with a matte metallic appearance and no visible markings.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no prominent visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface appears clean and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations apparent in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with a simple rectangular shape. There are no extensions, flares, finger rests, or visible logos or texturing, contributing to a streamlined and classic appearance.
